name: Barbell Bench Press
desc: Classic horizontal push. Set shoulder blades back and down, drive feet into floor. Bar touches lower chest.
notes: Arch is fine; don't let elbows flare past 75°.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
desc: 30–45° incline. Emphasises upper pec. Control descent 2–3s.

name: Cable Fly
desc: High-to-low or mid-cable fly. Maintain soft elbow through full ROM.

name: Push-Up
desc: Hands at shoulder width. Hollow body. Full ROM chin-to-floor.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
desc: Targets serratus and chest. Keep slight bend in elbows throughout.

name: Decline Barbell Press
desc: Lower chest emphasis. Feet secured. Keep tight arch.

name: Barbell Deadlift
desc: Hip-hinge pulling from the floor. Neutral spine, lat engagement before the pull.
notes: Push the floor away, don't just pull the bar.

name: Pull-Up
desc: Full ROM from dead hang to chin over bar. Scapular retraction before pulling.

name: Barbell Row
desc: Hip hinge, bar dragged to lower sternum. Keep lower back neutral.

name: Dumbbell Row
desc: Brace core, row to hip. Retract scapula at top.

name: Lat Pulldown
desc: Full overhead stretch at top, drive elbows to hips at bottom.

name: Seated Cable Row
desc: Tall spine, row to abdomen, retract scapulae.

name: T-Bar Row
desc: Chest pad or v-handle. Neutral spine, heavy loading.

name: Face Pull
desc: Rope to forehead, external rotation at top. Rear delt and rotator cuff.

name: Overhead Press
desc: Bar rests on front delts, press to lockout. Squeeze glutes to protect lower back.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
desc: Lead with elbows, slight forward lean. Stop at shoulder height.

name: Arnold Press
desc: Rotating DB press from neutral to pronated. Full overhead ROM.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
desc: Consistent tension throughout. Cross-body or same-side attachment.

name: Rear Delt Fly
desc: Hinge at hips, DB arcs to shoulder height. Pinch at top.

name: Bradford Press
desc: Alternate pressing in front of and behind head without lockout. Shoulder mobility drill.

name: Barbell Curl
desc: Strict curl, no swing. Squeeze bicep at top. Slow eccentric.

name: Hammer Curl
desc: Neutral grip targets brachialis and brachioradialis.

name: Tricep Dip
desc: Upright torso for tricep focus. Full lockout at top.

name: Skull Crusher
desc: EZ bar to forehead. Tricep long head priority. Control descent.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
desc: Full stretch at bottom with incline. Targets long head of bicep.

name: Tricep Pushdown
desc: Elbows pinned at sides. Full extension, squeeze.

name: Preacher Curl
desc: Arm supported on pad. Isolates short head. Strict form only.

name: Plank
desc: Forearm or hand plank. Hollow body: ribs down, glutes tight, neutral spine.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
desc: From knees or toes, rollout to full extension maintaining hollow body.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
desc: Dead hang, raise legs to parallel or higher. Control descent.

name: Cable Crunch
desc: Kneel, pull rope to floor, crunch through full ROM.

name: Pallof Press
desc: Anti-rotation press. Brace against cable pull. Critical for spine health.

name: Dead Bug
desc: Opposite arm-leg lower. Lower back pressed to floor throughout.

name: Copenhagen Plank
desc: Side plank with top foot on bench. Adductor and core loading.

name: Back Squat
desc: High or low bar. Hip crease below parallel. Knees tracking toes.

name: Front Squat
desc: Bar racked on front delts. Upright torso, deep squat. Wrist mobility required.

name: Romanian Deadlift
desc: Hip hinge with soft knees. Bar stays close to legs. Deep hamstring stretch.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
desc: Rear foot elevated. Front shin vertical. Glute dominant loading.

name: Leg Press
desc: Full ROM, do not lock knees at top. Foot placement changes emphasis.

name: Leg Curl
desc: Lying or seated. Full ROM. Hamstring isolation.

name: Leg Extension
desc: Quad isolation. Control descent. Avoid hyperextension.

name: Hip Thrust
desc: Bench at mid-scapula. Drive hips to full extension. Glute primary.

name: Walking Lunge
desc: Knee just above floor. Torso upright. Alternate legs.

name: Calf Raise
desc: Full plantarflexion. Pause at top and bottom. Single-leg for progression.

name: Good Morning
desc: Bar on traps. Hip hinge until torso parallel. Hamstring tension.

name: Hack Squat
desc: Pad on shoulders. Full depth. Quad dominant.

name: Thruster
desc: Front squat into overhead press in one fluid movement. Used in CrossFit/Metcon.

name: Kettlebell Swing
desc: Hip hinge explosive drive. Bell to chest height. Lat engagement at top.

name: Turkish Get-Up
desc: From lying to standing with KB overhead. Systematic 6-step movement.

name: Man Maker
desc: Push-up → row × 2 → clean → press. Complex movement.

name: Box Jump
desc: Triple extension, land softly. Step down, don't jump down.

name: Burpee
desc: Plank → push-up → jump. Full extension at top.

name: Sled Push
desc: Drive through legs. Maintain forward lean. Loaded conditioning.

name: Farmer's Carry
desc: Heavy DBs, tall spine, tight core. Walk for distance or time.

name: Battle Ropes
desc: Alternating or simultaneous waves. Upper body power endurance.

name: Snatch
desc: One-movement pull from floor to overhead. Requires extensive mobility and timing.

name: Clean and Jerk
desc: Two-part lift: clean to front rack, then split jerk overhead.

name: Power Clean
desc: Clean caught above parallel. Athletic development exercise.

name: Hang Power Snatch
desc: Snatch from hang position. Emphasises the second pull.

name: Clean Pull
desc: Full extension pull without the catch. Builds pulling strength.

name: Snatch Balance
desc: Drop under bar from behind neck. Develops receiving position.

name: Row Erg
desc: Drive with legs 60%, lean back 20%, arms 20%. Maintain 18–24 SPM for endurance.

name: Assault Bike
desc: Full body cycling. Excellent for HIIT. RPE 8–10 for sprints.

name: Ski Erg
desc: Lat-dominant pulling machine. Pull to hip, not below.

name: Running
desc: Varies by pace. Zone 2 for aerobic base. Tempo for threshold.

name: Jump Rope
desc: Double-unders or singles. Timing and rhythm training.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
desc: Lunge → thoracic rotation → hamstring stretch in one flow. Excellent warm-up.

name: Hip 90/90
desc: Internal and external hip rotation in seated 90/90 position. Hip health.

name: Couch Stretch
desc: Hip flexor stretch with rear leg against wall. Quad and hip flexor.

name: Jefferson Curl
desc: Segmental spinal flexion with load. Builds spinal erector strength and flexibility.

name: Ankle Circles
desc: Full ROM ankle mobility. Seated or standing.

name: Cat-Cow
desc: Spinal flexion and extension. Quadruped. Breathing driven.

name: Pigeon Pose
desc: Deep glute and hip external rotator stretch.

name: Thoracic Extension on Foam Roller
desc: Place roller at mid-back, extend over it. Counters kyphosis.

name: Banded Pull-Apart
desc: Band held at chest height, pull to full extension. Rear delt and rotator cuff warm-up.

name: Sled Pull
desc: Rope pull of weighted sled. Upper body and core loaded pull.

name: Wall Ball
desc: Squat, throw ball to target, catch and repeat. CrossFit / Hyrox staple.

name: Sandbag Carry
desc: Bear hug or shoulder carry of sandbag for distance.

name: SkiErg Intervals
desc: Repeated SkiErg sprints. Common in Hyrox and functional fitness.

name: Rowing Machine Intervals
desc: Interval rowing: 30s hard / 30s easy. Builds aerobic and power.

name: Banded Squat
desc: Band around knees adds abductor demand. Forces knee tracking.

name: Band Pull-Through
desc: Hip hinge with band resistance. Glute and hamstring activation.

name: Glute Bridge
desc: Lying hip thrust without bench. Glute activation exercise.

name: Single-Leg Deadlift
desc: Balance, proprioception, hamstring. Keep hips square.

name: Nordic Curl
desc: Eccentric hamstring curl. Feet anchored, lower under control.

name: Sissy Squat
desc: Knee dominant quad exercise. Lean back as knees travel forward.

name: Step-Up
desc: Weighted step-up to box. Drive through heel of working leg.

name: Goblet Squat
desc: Kettlebell or dumbbell at chest. Great learning tool for squat pattern.

name: Ring Row
desc: Inverted row on rings. Adjust angle for difficulty.

name: Dips (Chest)
desc: Slight forward lean emphasises chest. Full ROM at bottom.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
desc: Narrow grip bench for tricep emphasis. Elbows stay close.

name: Concentration Curl
desc: Elbow braced on inner thigh. Maximum bicep isolation.

name: Zottman Curl
desc: Supinated up, pronated down. Trains both bicep and brachioradialis.

name: Wrist Roller
desc: Forearm and wrist extensor/flexor endurance.

name: 1 min hard / 1 min easy
desc: 1 minute high effort, 1 minute easy. Interval conditioning.

name: 1-mile cool-down run
desc: 1-mile easy cool-down after main session.

name: 1-mile run
desc: 1-mile time trial or training run. Aerobic performance benchmark.

name: 1-mile time trial
desc: 1-mile max effort test. Benchmark aerobic and VO2 fitness.

name: 100 double unders
desc: 100 consecutive double unders. Jump rope skill and coordination.

name: 100 wall balls
desc: 100 wall balls for time. HYROX simulation. Squat and throw endurance.

name: 100 wall balls for time
desc: 100 wall ball shots for time. Classic HYROX training benchmark.

name: 1000m row or ski
desc: 1000m rowing or ski erg. Aerobic threshold pace.

name: 100m burpee broad jump
desc: 100m covered via burpee broad jumps. Full body conditioning.

name: 100m walking lunge
desc: 100m walking lunge. Leg and glute endurance. HYROX prep.

name: 1km run
desc: 1km run. Warm-up, training, or HYROX benchmark distance.

name: 1km run + 100 Wall balls
desc: HYROX pair: 1km run + 100 wall balls. Cardio + leg endurance.

name: 1km run + 1000m Row
desc: HYROX pair: 1km run + 1000m row. Running + upper body pull.

name: 1km run + 1000m Ski erg
desc: HYROX pair: 1km run + 1000m ski erg. Running + upper pull.

name: 1km run + 100m Sandbag lunges
desc: HYROX pair: 1km run + 100m sandbag lunge. Total conditioning.

name: 1km run + 200m Farmer carry
desc: HYROX pair: 1km run + 200m farmer carry. Total body conditioning.

name: 1km run + 50m Sled pull
desc: HYROX pair: 1km run + 50m sled pull. Classic race simulation.

name: 1km run + 50m Sled push
desc: HYROX pair: 1km run + 50m sled push. Classic race simulation.

name: 1km run + 80m Burpee broad jump
desc: HYROX pair: 1km run + 80m burpee broad jump. Explosive conditioning.

name: 2 x 100m strides
desc: Two 100m strides. Build to race pace, relaxed form.

name: 2 x easy hill run
desc: Two easy hill reps. Hill-specific conditioning without max effort.

name: 2-arm 2-leg dead bug
desc: Full dead bug: both arms and legs lower. Maximum core demand.

name: 200m run after each carry
desc: 200m run following each carry set. Aerobic + strength combo.

name: 20s acceleration stride
desc: Short 20-second build from easy to near-max speed.

name: 21s (curl variation)
desc: 7 reps lower half + 7 upper half + 7 full ROM curls. Bicep pump technique.

name: 3-position arm abduction in quadrangle
desc: Arm abduction in three positions in quadruped. Shoulder stability.

name: 3-position arm abduction in tripod
desc: Arm abduction from tripod position. Rotator cuff and deltoid.

name: 3-rep max bench press
desc: 3-rep max bench press. Pushing movement exercise.

name: 3-rep max deadlift
desc: 3-rep max deadlift. Hip hinge pulling exercise.

name: 3-round warm-up circuit
desc: Three-round general warm-up circuit. Body temp and mobility.

name: 30-min easy run or 60-min hike
desc: Low intensity session: 30-min run or 60-min hike. Active recovery.

name: 30s max row / 30s complete rest
desc: Max effort 30s row sprint, complete rest 30s. Anaerobic power.

name: 4-point kneeling shoulder rotation
desc: Quadruped shoulder rotation. Shoulder health.

name: 400m repeat
desc: 400m run repeated with recovery. Lactate threshold and VO2 training.

name: 400m run
desc: 400m interval run. Track sprint or conditioning effort.

name: 400m run after sets 2 and 4
desc: 400m run after sets 2 and 4. Compromised strength training.

name: 5-min max rep bar-facing burpees
desc: 5-min max effort bar-facing burpees. Conditioning benchmark.

name: 50 burpee broad jumps
desc: 50 burpee broad jumps. Total body power endurance test.

name: 500m row or ski
desc: 500m at working pace on row erg or ski erg.

name: 500m row or ski intervals
desc: Repeated 500m efforts. Build endurance across sets.

name: 5k ski or row test
desc: 5km time trial on ski erg or rowing machine. Aerobic benchmark.

name: 800m run
desc: 800m run. Middle distance. Combines aerobic and anaerobic systems.

name: 90/90 good mornings
desc: Good morning in 90/90 hip position. Hip flexor and hamstring.

name: 90/90 heel taps
desc: Heel taps in 90/90 position. Hip mobility and control.

name: 90/90 hip + good morning
desc: Combination of 90/90 hip rotation and good morning movement.

name: 90/90 hip flow
desc: Hip mobility flow in 90/90 position. Internal and external rotation.

name: 90/90 Hip Rotation
desc: Hip rotation drill in 90/90. Great for hip health.

name: 90/90 Hip Rotation Recovery
desc: Gentle 90/90 hip rotation for recovery sessions.

name: 90/90 to spread hip flow
desc: Transition from 90/90 to spread position. Hip mobility flow.

name: 90/90 wall internal rotation
desc: Wall-supported hip internal rotation in 90/90.

name: A-skips
desc: High knee drive with active foot strike. Running mechanics drill.

name: Ab rollout
desc: From knees or toes, rollout to full extension maintaining hollow body.

name: Acceleration strides
desc: Short acceleration runs (80–100m). Neuromuscular activation pre-session.

name: Adams thing
desc: Specific drill or exercise. Ask coach for precise movement description.

name: Air overhead squats
desc: Overhead squat with no load. Mobility and position drill.

name: Air squats
desc: Bodyweight squat. Hip crease below parallel. Knees track toes.

name: Alternating reverse Zercher lunges
desc: Zercher-loaded reverse lunges. Bar in elbow crooks, elbows high.

name: Assault bike calories
desc: Assault bike calorie effort. Full-body cycling. Intense conditioning.

name: ATG stretch
desc: Ass-to-Grass stretch hold. Full depth squat. Ankle and hip mobility.

name: B-skips
desc: High knee + leg extension. Running form development drill.

name: Back squat / Front squat
desc: Either bar position. Full depth, knees tracking toes.

name: Back squat — bar
desc: Back squat with empty bar. Technique and position practice.

name: Backbone mobilization
desc: Spinal mobility exercises. Flexion, extension, rotation.

name: Band pull-aparts
desc: Band pull-apart. Rear delt and rotator cuff warm-up.

name: Banded birddog
desc: Birddog with band resistance. Core stability and anti-rotation.

name: Banded glute bridge
desc: Glute bridge with band above knees. Abductor activation.

name: Banded good mornings
desc: Banded good mornings. Functional exercise used in strength and conditioning.

name: Banded overhead squats
desc: Overhead squats with band assistance. Shoulder and squat positions.

name: Bar elbow stretch
desc: Elbow stretch using barbell. Warm-up for pressing.

name: Bar triceps stretch
desc: Triceps stretch over barbell. Pre-press warm-up.

name: Barbell Ankle STRETCH
desc: Leverage barbell for ankle dorsiflexion stretch.

name: Barbell row (pronated grip)
desc: Overhand barbell row. Pronated grip shifts emphasis to upper back.

name: Barbell Tall Clean
desc: Barbell tall clean. Drop under from standing. Speed under bar drill.

name: Barbell thrusters
desc: Barbell front squat into overhead press. CrossFit/HYROX conditioning staple.

name: BB ATG split squat
desc: Barbell ATG split squat. Extreme depth. Knee and hip flexibility.

name: BB row
desc: Hip hinge, bar dragged to lower sternum. Keep lower back neutral.

name: BB Seated good morning
desc: Barbell seated good morning. Strict hip hinge without leg drive.

name: Behind Back Shoulder Band STRETCH
desc: Banded stretch behind back. Anterior shoulder and chest.

name: Behind-the-neck split jerk
desc: Jerk from behind-the-neck position. Extreme shoulder flexibility drill.

name: Belt squat or Leg press
desc: Belt squat or leg press. Quad and glute loading. Spares the spine.

name: Bench press
desc: Horizontal push. Set shoulder blades back and down, bar touches lower chest.

name: Bench press (3s pause at bottom)
desc: Pause bench. 3-second pause at chest. Eliminates bounce.

name: Bench press build-up
desc: Progressive warm-up sets for bench press.

name: Bench press — bar only
desc: Bench press with empty bar. Technique and activation warm-up.

name: Body Weight Ankle STRETCH
desc: Bodyweight ankle dorsiflexion stretch. Knee-over-toe position.

name: Box Front Squat
desc: Front squat to box. Builds strength out of the hole. No bounce.

name: Box jumps
desc: Triple extension — ankles, knees, hips. Land softly. Step down.

name: Box step over with sandbag
desc: Step over box with sandbag. Coordination, strength, and conditioning.

name: BTN press (behind-the-neck)
desc: BTN press (behind-the-neck). Pushing movement exercise.

name: Build-up 250m
desc: 250m erg build-up. Start easy, increase power each 50m.

name: Build-up set
desc: Warm-up set building toward working weight. Groove pattern before loading.

name: Burpee broad jump

name: Burpees
desc: Plank to push-up to jump. Full extension at top.

name: Cable pull-through
desc: Hip hinge with cable between legs. Glute and hamstring activation.

name: Cable pushdown
desc: Cable tricep pushdown. Elbows pinned. Full extension and squeeze.

name: Cal ski erg
desc: Ski erg for calorie target. Power output focused.

name: Calf raise + ankle circles
desc: Calf raises followed by ankle circles. Lower leg warm-up.

name: Calf stretch
desc: Wall calf stretch. Full ROM. Hold 30s each side.

name: Calf stretch against wall
desc: Wall calf stretch. Gastrocnemius and soleus. Hold 30s.

name: Capsular ankle rotations
desc: Deep ankle mobility circles for joint capsule warm-up.

name: Chest massage with plate
desc: Self-myofascial release on chest with plate. Pec release.

name: Chest stretch & activation
desc: Chest stretch with activation drills. Pre-bench warm-up.

name: Clean & Jerk
desc: Two-part lift: clean to front rack, then jerk overhead.

name: Clean deadlift
desc: Controlled deadlift with clean grip. Builds positions and leg drive.

name: Clean good morning
desc: Good morning with clean grip. Hip hinge and posterior chain.

desc: Seated good morning with clean grip. Strict isolation drill.

name: Clean high pull
desc: Clean pull with shrug and high elbow. Transition to catch position.

name: Clean Sots Press
desc: Clean-grip Sotts press in deep squat. Mobility and stability.

desc: Clean grip overhead squat. Shoulder flexibility drill.

name: Conversational run
desc: Run at pace where conversation is easy. Zone 2 aerobic work.

name: Cool-down jog
desc: Post-workout easy jog. Reduce HR gradually.

name: Cool-down run
desc: Easy post-workout jog. Reduce HR, promote recovery.

desc: Dumbbell Bulgarian split squat. Rear foot elevated. Unilateral strength.

name: DB curl (strict)
desc: Strict dumbbell curl. No swing. Squeeze at top. Slow eccentric.

name: DB deadlift
desc: Dumbbell deadlift. Hip hinge, neutral spine. Good entry-level hinge.

desc: Dragon squat with dumbbells. Knee-dominant mobility strength exercise.

desc: Dumbbell hang clean. Hip drive pulls DB to shoulder height.

desc: Kozak squat with DB and hip rotation. Adductor mobility and strength.

name: DB push press

desc: Weighted step-up. Drive through heel of working leg.

name: Dead hang

name: Deadlift
desc: Hip-hinge pulling from the floor. Neutral spine, lat engagement. Drive the floor away.

name: Deadlift 5-5-3-3-1
desc: Wave-loaded deadlift: 5/5/3/3/1. Increase weight each set.

name: Deadlift build-up
desc: Progressive warm-up sets for deadlift. Build to working weight.

name: Deadlift — bar only
desc: Deadlift technique with empty bar. Groove hinge pattern.

name: Deep squat stretch
desc: Hold bottom of squat. Hip, ankle, and thoracic mobility.

desc: Calf raise from raised surface. Greater stretch and ROM.

name: Depth jumps

name: Diagonal child pose

name: Double-unders

desc: Lunge with dowel for hip internal rotation. Hip mobility.

desc: Dynamic hip flexor stretch. Mobility and flexibility work.

name: Dynamic quad stretch
desc: Dynamic quad stretch. Mobility and flexibility work.

desc: Easy rowing on erg. Warm-up or cool-down. Low intensity.

desc: Inverted push-up. Shoulder pressing strength and balance.

name: Incline DB curl
desc: Incline curls. Full stretch at bottom. Targets long head of bicep.

name: Incline DB press
desc: 30–45° incline dumbbell press. Upper chest. Control 2–3s descent.

name: Incline toe raises
desc: Stand on incline with heels elevated. Shin and ankle mobility.

name: Inside band OHS
desc: Overhead squat with band inside arms. Lat and shoulder activation.

name: Jerk balance
desc: Split jerk footwork drill. Land in split, drive back leg to catch.

name: Jerk recovery
desc: Recover from jerk split position to standing. Technique drill.

name: KB clean and jerk
desc: Kettlebell clean to shoulder then jerk overhead. Power conditioning.

name: KB swings
desc: Hip-hinge explosive drive. Bell to chest height. Lat engagement at top.

name: Knee mobilization
desc: Knee joint mobility exercises. Circles and range of motion.

name: Kneeling Chest Mobilization
desc: Kneeling chest stretch and mobilization. Anterior chain opening.

name: Kneeling Chest Opener
desc: Kneeling chest opening stretch. Pec and anterior shoulder.

name: Kneeling Deep Chest Opener
desc: Deep kneeling chest stretch. Pec and shoulder flexibility.

name: Kneeling leg cross lift
desc: Kneeling cross-body leg lift. Hip and glute activation.

name: Kneeling scapula activation
desc: Kneeling scapula depression and retraction. Shoulder health.

name: Kneeling triceps PVC stretch
desc: Kneeling triceps PVC stretch. Mobility and flexibility work.

name: Kneeling wrists mobilization
desc: Wrist circles and extensions in kneeling. Wrist warm-up.

name: Kneeling wrists mobilization with bar
desc: Wrist mobilization with bar assistance. Pre-press warm-up.

name: Knees & backbone mobilization
desc: Combined knee and spinal mobility work.

name: Knees and backbone mobilization
desc: Knee and back mobility sequence. Warm-up for squatting.

name: Kosak squat shifts
desc: Side-to-side Cossack squat. Adductor and hip mobility.

name: L-sit
desc: Support on parallettes/floor, legs held parallel. Core and hip flexor strength.

name: Last mile — max effort (optional)
desc: Optional final mile at max effort. Simulate race finish.

name: Lat Band STRETCH
desc: Banded lat stretch. Thoracic and shoulder mobility.

name: Lat pulldown (close grip)
desc: Close-grip pulldown. Lower lat emphasis. Full overhead stretch.

name: Lateral raise
desc: DB or cable. Lead with elbows. Medial delt. Stop at shoulder height.

name: Laying barrier Y's and T's
desc: Prone Y and T raises over box. Lower trap and rear delt.

name: Leg circles off bike (optional)
desc: Lying leg circles after cycling. Hip flexor and hip mobility.

name: Leg swings
desc: Dynamic front/back and lateral leg swings. Hip mobility warm-up.

name: Leg swings — front/back
desc: Sagittal plane leg swings. Hamstring and hip flexor activation.

name: Leg swings — lateral
desc: Frontal plane leg swings. Adductor and abductor activation.

name: Legs dead bug
desc: Dead bug legs only. Core stability. Lower back pressed to floor.

name: Legs up the wall
desc: Supine legs-up-the-wall. Passive hamstring and recovery.

name: Light band curls
desc: Resistance band curls. Bicep warm-up or finisher.

name: Light mobility + active stretch
desc: Low-intensity mobility and active stretching. Warm-up.

name: Long hike or bike
desc: Extended low-intensity. Active recovery or Zone 1–2 cardio.

name: Long run
desc: Extended aerobic run. 60–120 min at easy to moderate effort.

name: Lying leg curl
desc: Prone leg curl. Hamstring isolation. Full ROM.

name: Max chin-ups + Max dips
desc: Max chin-ups and max dips back to back. Upper body endurance test.

name: Max distance farmer carry
desc: Farmer carry for maximum distance. Grip and full-body endurance test.

name: Max distance run
desc: Run for maximum distance in given time. Aerobic capacity test.

name: Max KB clean and jerk
desc: AMRAP kettlebell clean and jerks. Strength-endurance test.

name: Max push-ups
desc: Max rep push-up test. Measure upper body pushing endurance.

name: Max strict pull-up test
desc: Max strict pull-up test. Pulling strength benchmark.

name: Max TRX rows
desc: Max reps on TRX row. Horizontal pulling endurance.

name: Mini band plank walk
desc: Plank walks with mini band. Core and shoulder stability.

name: Muscle clean from power position
desc: Clean without catching in squat. Pure upper body pull and power.

name: Muscle snatch from power position
desc: Snatch without catching in squat. Pure pulling power drill.

name: Muscle-ups
desc: Pull-up transitioning above bar into dip. Demanding shoulder and tricep.

name: Narrow squat toes rolls
desc: Narrow stance squat toes roll. Ankle dorsiflexion mobility.

name: Neck mobilization with plate
desc: Gentle neck mobility with light plate. Cervical range of motion.

name: Negative split run
desc: Run second half faster than first. Race tactics and pacing development.

name: OH press
desc: Overhead press. Bar from front rack to full lockout overhead.

name: Over-the-bar burpees
desc: Burpee jumping over barbell. Conditioning drill.

name: Overhead squat
desc: Barbell locked out overhead, full depth squat. Extreme mobility demand.

name: Overhead squats with plate
desc: Overhead squats with plate. Squat pattern exercise.

name: Overhead tricep extension
desc: DB or cable overhead. Long head of tricep. Full ROM.

name: Pause front squat (3s bottom)
desc: Front squat paused 3 seconds at bottom. Builds strength and position.

name: Pause front squat (3s)
desc: Front squat paused 3 seconds at bottom. Eliminates bounce.

name: Pause squat (3s hold)
desc: Back squat with 3-second pause at bottom. Builds out-of-the-hole strength.

name: Pause squat clean (2s below knee)
desc: Squat clean paused 2 seconds below knee. Builds patience and position.

name: Pigeon rotation
desc: Pigeon pose with thoracic rotation. Hip and spine mobility.

name: Plank hold
desc: Static plank. Hollow body position: ribs down, glutes on, neutral spine.

name: Plate Good Mornings
desc: Plate Good Mornings. Functional exercise used in strength and conditioning.

name: Plie back to wall
desc: Plie squat with back against wall. Adductor and inner thigh.

name: Plie chest to wall
desc: Plie squat facing wall. Knees out depth drill.

name: Powell rise
desc: Lying side raise for rear delt. 4-sec eccentric. Shoulder health.

name: Power clean + squat clean
desc: Clean complex: power clean followed by squat clean.

name: Power clean + Squat clean + Hang power clean + Hang squat clean
desc: Full clean complex from hang to squat catch.

name: Power snatch + Hang squat snatch
desc: Snatch complex: power snatch followed by hang squat snatch.

name: Prisoner squat
desc: Squat with hands behind head. Tests hip and thoracic mobility.

name: Pull-ups
desc: Full ROM dead hang to chin over bar. Scapular depression before pulling.

name: Push jerk
desc: Dip and drive, lock out overhead. Feet stay in place.

name: Push press
desc: Dip and drive with legs, press with arms. More load than strict press.

name: Push press + Push jerk (2+2)
desc: Complex: 2 push press then 2 push jerks. Jerk technique builder.

name: Push press — bar only
desc: Push press with empty bar. Learn the dip-drive-lockout pattern.

name: Push-ups
desc: Hollow body. Chest to floor. Full lockout at top.

name: PVC 1/2 Tall Clean
desc: Half tall clean with PVC. Learning the pull-under movement.

name: PVC Front Rack Duck Walk
desc: Walk in squat with PVC in front rack. Clean position mobility.

name: PVC frontal rotation
desc: PVC frontal plane rotation. Shoulder and thoracic mobility.

name: PVC lats mobilization
desc: PVC lat mobilization. Overhead reaching and lat flexibility.

name: PVC lats rotation stretching
desc: PVC rotation for lat stretch. Thoracic and shoulder.

name: PVC lunge position rotation
desc: PVC rotation in lunge position. Hip and thoracic mobility.

name: PVC Overhead Duck Walk
desc: Walk in squat with PVC overhead. Ankle, hip, and shoulder mobility.

name: PVC overhead squats
desc: Overhead squat with PVC pipe. Mobility and technique drill.

name: PVC press behind neck laying
desc: PVC behind-the-neck press lying. Shoulder mobility drill.

name: PVC Rack Hip Muscle Clean + Front Squat
desc: Muscle clean + front squat complex with PVC.

name: PVC raise laying
desc: PVC raise while lying. Shoulder mobility assessment.

name: PVC shoulder circle up
desc: PVC shoulder circles. Warm-up for overhead movements.

name: PVC shoulder rotators stretch
desc: Shoulder rotator stretch using PVC. Pre-press mobility.

name: PVC shoulders mobilization
desc: PVC shoulder mobilization series. Overhead flexibility.

name: PVC sole mobilization
desc: PVC foot/ankle mobilization. Plantar fascia and arch.

name: PVC Tall Clean
desc: Tall clean with PVC. Drop under from standing. Speed drill.

name: PVC Tall Muscle Clean
desc: Tall muscle clean with PVC. Upper body clean technique.

name: PVC upper body stretch
desc: Upper body stretch using PVC. Shoulder and thoracic.

name: Quad + hamstring stretch
desc: Standing quad stretch and hamstring stretch sequence.

name: Quadruped hip rotations
desc: Quadruped hip circles. Hip joint mobility and activation.

name: Quadruped hip side flexion
desc: Quadruped lateral hip flexion. Hip mobility.

name: Rack chest stretch
desc: Chest stretch using rack. Anterior shoulder and pec opener.

name: Rack elbows rotation
desc: Shoulder/elbow rotation drill using rack. Warm-up.

name: Rack elbows rotation + Front Rack hold
desc: Rack rotation into front rack hold. Clean position prep.

name: Rack lats stretch
desc: Lat stretch using rack. Thoracic and lat mobility.

name: Rack triceps stretch
desc: Triceps stretch using rack. Elbow flexion ROM.

name: Recovery run
desc: Active recovery run. Very easy effort. Sub 65% max HR.

name: Roman chair
desc: Hyperextension on GHD or Roman chair. Erector spinae and glute strength.

name: Row
desc: Rowing ergometer. Drive with legs, lean, arms. Distance or calorie target.

name: Row (calories)
desc: Row for calorie target. Higher intensity rowing. HYROX/CrossFit.

name: Row or Bike easy
desc: Easy row or bike. Warm-up or recovery. Low to moderate effort.

name: Row or ski intervals
desc: Alternating rowing and ski erg intervals. Mixed upper body endurance.

name: Row or ski — 1000m intervals
desc: 1000m intervals on row erg or ski erg. Aerobic threshold work.

name: Row or ski — 500m intervals
desc: 500m intervals on row erg or ski erg. Above-threshold conditioning.

name: Rubber band rack lat pull
desc: Banded lat pull from rack. Lat warm-up and activation.

name: Run
desc: Running at prescribed pace. Cardio and conditioning.

name: Run 200m → station → run 200m
desc: Running bracket: 200m run, complete station, 200m run back.

name: Sandbag front rack lunge
desc: Sandbag in front rack. Lunge forward or reverse. Core challenged.

name: Sandbag over shoulder
desc: Pick sandbag from floor and toss over one shoulder. Total body power.

name: Sandbag squat
desc: Sandbag bear-hugged or front-racked. Squat to full depth.

name: Scapular pull-ups
desc: Dead hang with scapular depression. Shoulder health and lat activation.

name: Sciatic nerve glide
desc: Sciatic nerve mobilization. Nerve health and lower back.

name: Seated box jumps

name: Seated cable row (wide grip)

name: Seated leg barrier raise
desc: Seated leg raises over barrier. Hip flexion mobility.

name: Shoulder Band STRETCH
desc: Banded shoulder stretch. Anterior and posterior shoulder capsule.

name: Shoulder circles
desc: Arm circles for shoulder warm-up. Forward and backward.

name: Shoulder circles (arm circles)
desc: Arm circles to warm up shoulder joint. Dynamic shoulder prep.

name: Shoulder circles + hip circles
desc: Combined shoulder and hip circles. Full body warm-up.

name: Shoulder rotation outside lying
desc: Lying external shoulder rotation. Rotator cuff activation.

name: Shoulder spins with rubber bands
desc: Band shoulder circles and rotations. Dynamic shoulder warm-up.

name: Side banded butterfly
desc: Side-lying banded butterfly. Hip external rotation activation.

name: Side lunge mobilization
desc: Side lunge for adductor and hip mobility.

name: Single leg bench squat
desc: Bulgarian-style single-leg squat to bench. Strength and balance.

name: Single-leg standing calf raise
desc: Unilateral calf raise. Full ROM. Balance and stability.

name: Sit-ups
desc: Full range sit-up. Hip flexors and abs.

name: Sitting good morning
desc: Sitting good morning. Functional exercise used in strength and conditioning.

name: Sitting press on 3 plates
desc: Sitting press on 3 plates. Pushing movement exercise.

name: Sitting press on 4 plates
desc: Sitting press on 4 plates. Pushing movement exercise.

name: Sitting press on 5 plates
desc: Sitting press on 5 plates. Pushing movement exercise.

name: Sleeping armwrestler
desc: Side-lying external rotation. Rotator cuff strength.

name: Slow resisted squats
desc: Band-resisted squats performed slowly. Control and activation.

name: Snatch balance + OHS
desc: Snatch balance into overhead squat. Position and stability drill.

name: Snatch deadlift from blocks
desc: Slow snatch deadlift from blocks. Builds leg drive for snatch.

name: Snatch from blocks (mid-shin)
desc: Snatch from mid-shin blocks. Eliminates leg fatigue.

name: Snatch high pull
desc: Snatch pull + high elbow pull. Transition drill to snatch catch.

name: Snatch lift off + Slow-pull squat snatch + Squat snatch
desc: Snatch complex: lift off + tempo snatch + full snatch.

name: Snatch pull
desc: Full extension snatch pull without catch. Builds position and power.

name: Snatch-grip deadlift to power pos + shrug
desc: Snatch-grip deadlift to power pos + shrug. Hip hinge pulling exercise.

name: Snatch-grip RDL (tempo 3-1-1)
desc: Snatch-grip RDL with 3-sec eccentric. Builds posterior chain.

name: Snatch-grip Romanian deadlift
desc: Wide snatch grip RDL. Builds pulling strength and positions.

name: Soleus squat
desc: Squat targeting the soleus. Knee over toe, heel stays down.

name: Sotts press
desc: Overhead press from deep squat. Extreme shoulder and hip mobility.

name: Squat clean
desc: Clean caught in full squat position. Maximum pulling efficiency.

name: Squat clean + Hang squat clean + Jerk
desc: Complex: squat clean + hang squat clean + jerk. Olympic volume.

name: Squat knee touches
desc: Squat with hands touching knees. Mobility and body awareness.

name: Squat sit
desc: Passive deep squat hold. Hip, ankle, and groin mobility.

name: Squat toes rolls
desc: Squat while rolling on toes. Ankle and arch mobility.

name: Squat with rotation
desc: Squat with thoracic rotation at bottom. Hip and spine mobility.

name: Standing hamstring stretch
desc: Standing forward fold or single-leg hamstring stretch.

name: Standing KB marches
desc: Standing KB marches. Functional exercise used in strength and conditioning.

name: Standing quad stretch
desc: Standing quad stretch. 30s each side. Good post-run.

name: Steady-state cycling
desc: Sustained cycling at constant pace. Zone 2–3 aerobic work.

name: Steady-state ski erg
desc: Extended ski erg at consistent pace. Zone 2–3 upper body endurance.

name: Steady-state tempo run
desc: Sustained threshold effort. Lactate threshold development.

name: Strict press
desc: Overhead press with no leg drive. Pure shoulder strength.

name: Strict pull-ups (C2B optional)
desc: Strict pull-ups. Chest to bar option. Pure pulling strength.

name: Strides
desc: Short acceleration runs (80–100m). Pre-workout neuromuscular activation.

name: Sumo deadlift
desc: Wide stance, grip inside legs. Hip and groin dominant. Vertical bar path.

name: Sumo deadlift high-pull
desc: Sumo deadlift explodes into upright row. Olympic accessory exercise.

name: Support 90/90 Hip Rotation
desc: Supported 90/90 hip rotation. Hands assist movement.

name: Supported barrier hip rotations
desc: Hip rotations with support. Hip joint mobility.

name: Supported leg kick with hip rotation
desc: Supported leg kicks with hip rotation. Hip mobility warm-up.

name: Supported step forward
desc: Supported forward step. Hip mobility and balance drill.

name: Tall clean (from standing, no knee bend)
desc: Tall clean from standing. Purely upper body pull and drop.

name: Tall snatch
desc: Tall snatch from standing. No knee bend. Speed under bar drill.

name: Tempo front squat (2-1-2-1)
desc: Front squat: 2s down, 1s pause, 2s up, 1s top. Control-focused.

name: Thrusters
desc: Front squat into overhead press. Full-body compound movement.

name: Toe extension lunges
desc: Lunge with toe extended. Ankle and foot mobility.

name: Toe touch to squat
desc: Touch toes then flow into deep squat. Full posterior chain warm-up.

name: Trap 3
desc: Prone Y-raise or incline trap 3 raise. Lower trap activation.

name: Triceps Band STRETCH
desc: Banded triceps stretch. Elbow extension and shoulder flexibility.

name: Upper back activation
desc: Upper back activation drills. Prepares rear chain for pulling.

name: Upright row
desc: Narrow grip, pull bar to chin. Traps and lateral delts. Keep elbows high.

name: Vertex press laying
desc: Lying overhead press variation. Shoulder position drill.

name: Walking cool-down
desc: Walk to cool down after hard effort. Reduces HR progressively.

name: Wall ball shots
desc: Squat with medball, throw to target height, catch and repeat.

name: Wall balls
desc: Squat with medball, throw to target, catch and repeat. HYROX staple.

name: Wall sit calf raise
desc: Wall sit position with calf raises. Isometric hold + calf work.

name: Wall slide
desc: Wall slide for shoulder mobility. Arms slide up wall. Thoracic extension.

name: Wall slide four
desc: Advanced wall slide variation. Four-point contact shoulder mobility.

name: Weighted alternating dead bug
desc: Dead bug with added weight. Increased core challenge.

name: Weighted butterfly
desc: Groin stretch with weight on knees. Adductor flexibility.

name: Weighted chin-ups
desc: Chin-up with added load (supinated grip). Bicep-dominant pulling.

name: Weighted Deep Squat STRETCH
desc: Hold weight in deep squat. Increases depth and mobility.

name: Weighted dips
desc: Dip with added load. Chest/tricep strength. Forward lean for chest.

name: Weighted pull-ups
desc: Pull-up with added load. Builds maximum pulling strength.

name: Weighted pull-ups (neutral grip)
desc: Weighted pull-ups (neutral grip). Pulling movement exercise.

name: Weighted squat knee touches
desc: Squat with weighted knee touches. Mobility drill.

name: Wide squat push aways
desc: Wide squat pushing knees out with elbows. Groin opener.

name: World's greatest stretch + knee push
desc: Lunge + thoracic rotation + hamstring stretch + knee push.

name: Zone 2 run
desc: Run at 65–75% max HR. Primary aerobic development zone.
